title: Sinigang na Baboy
description: A sour tamarind-based pork soup loaded with vegetables. A true Filipino comfort dish.
ingredients: 1 kg pork belly or ribs, cut into pieces
instructions: Boil water in a pot. Add pork, onion, and tomatoes. Simmer for 45 minutes until pork is tender.
Add sinigang mix and stir. Adjust sourness to taste.
Add radish and green chili. Cook for 5 minutes.
Season with fish sauce and salt.
Add kangkong last, cook for 1 minute. Serve hot with rice.
